subject: Political Science
overall_learning_objectives: Critically analyse the outcomes of democratic governance
Evaluate whether democracies successfully meet citizens' expectations
Interpret statistical data related to democracy and development
Examine economic inequality and poverty in democratic societies
Assess how democracies manage social conflicts and diversity
Analyse the role of democratic institutions in protecting dignity and freedom
Develop critical arguments about strengths and limitations of democracy

lesson_plan.title: Critical Understanding of Democratic Outcomes
topics_covered: Difference between democratic ideals and real practice
student_activities: List expectations citizens have from democracy
Analyse whether these expectations are always achieved

lesson_plan.title: Accountability, Transparency and Legitimacy
topics_covered: Role of elections and citizen participation
student_activities: Analyse real-life examples of government accountability
Debate whether democracy always produces responsible governments

lesson_plan.title: Public Support and Legitimacy of Democracy
topics_covered: Reasons for public support of democracy
student_activities: Interpret survey data on democratic support
Discuss why citizens still support democracy despite its weaknesses

lesson_plan.title: Democracy and Economic Development Debate
topics_covered: Economic growth under democracies and dictatorships
Limits of democracy in economic growth
student_activities: Prepare arguments supporting democracy or dictatorship for development
Participate in debate on economic performance

lesson_plan.title: Democracy and Social Diversity
student_activities: Analyse examples where democracy resolved social conflicts
Discuss how majority decisions should respect minority rights

lesson_plan.title: Dignity, Freedom and Evaluation of Democracy
topics_covered: Role of democracy in protecting dignity and equality
student_activities: Create a concept map showing outcomes of democracy
Write a short essay evaluating democratic governance

teaching_aids: Charts showing income distribution and survey data
Projector for statistical tables and graphs
teacher_tip: Encourage students to critically evaluate democratic systems by connecting textbook concepts with current political events and real-world examples.
